title: oldenlandia mitrasacmoides subsp. trachymenoides
intro: Oldenlandia mitrasacmoides subsp. trachymenoides, also known as a plant species in the genus Oldenlandia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia mitrasacmoides subsp. trachymenoides include its potential to treat fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules to utilize its medicinal properties.
